meta.title: Bible avatar prompts (all individuals from 200 stories)
meta.note: Generated from assets/200_stories with disciples/apostles/brothers expanded to individuals. All characters with mention_count >= 1 are emitted; is_active_default=true when mention_count >= 2, or when a character appears in an era_judges story at least once. Some codes have explicit visibility overrides, including abijah_judah=true, absalom=true, ahab=true, ahaz=true, ahaziah_israel=true, ahaziah_judah=true, amaziah_judah=true, amon_judah=true, asa=true, athaliah=true, baasha=true, elah_king=true, haggai=true, hoshea_king=true, jehoahaz_israel=true, jehoahaz_judah=true, jehoash_israel=true, jehoiachin=true, jehoiakim=true, jehoram_judah=true, jehoshaphat=true, jehu=true, jeroboam=true, jeroboam_ii=true, joash_judah=true, jonah=true, jonathan=true, joram_israel=true, josiah=true, jotham=true, manasseh=true, menahem=true, micaiah=true, naaman=true, nadab=true, omri=true, pekah=true, pekahiah=true, rehoboam=true, shallum=true, uzziah=true, zechariah_king=true, zechariah_prophet=true, zedekiah=true, zerubbabel=true, zimri=true, elizabeth=false, gabriel=false, god=false.
